/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -g CMakeFiles/smoke_test.dir/smoke_test.cpp.o -o smoke_test  -Wl,-rpath,/data/qy/KuiperLLama/build/_deps/armadillo-build ../libarmadillo.so.14.0.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenblas.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/liblapack.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libarpack.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsuperlu.so
